product.name: Agent Jumbo
product.summary: General-purpose local assistant that can chat, call tools, and coordinate subagents.
primary_users: Power users who want local agent automation

capabilities: Tool execution (shell, browser agent, email, memory, scheduler)
Web UI for settings, tasks, and monitoring
Cowork mode approvals and folder scoping
Gmail OAuth integration with test utility
key_constraints: Requires explicit configuration for models and API keys
core_workflows: User sends a request in the UI
Results appear in chat history and logs
